requirements.title: bug-fix-pipeline Phase B6 wires the verdict through the tool
Structural tests assert the v2.2.0 framework is wired

reuse_decisions.anchor: skills/common-pipeline-conventions/SKILL.md — canonical home for cross-cutting disciplines (v1.4/1.6/1.7/1.8/2.0 pattern)
hooks/vao_tools.py — 6 existing tools live here; 7th is the same module-not-hook pattern
hooks/review_evidence_schema.py — OPTIONAL_VAO_FIELDS tuple was added in v2.1.0 specifically for this extension shape
agents/qa-replayer.md — existing Phase B6 verification agent; the audit naturally lives there
skills/bug-fix-pipeline/SKILL.md — Phase B6 already documents the verdict routing; v2.2.0 adds the tool call
tests/test_vao_live_verification_claim.py + tests/test_verified_live_discipline.py + 3 fixtures — same pattern as v2.1.0
NO new agent — deterministic check (3 named failure modes with concrete signatures); a tool verdict suffices; growing the agent inventory unboundedly is the wrong scale
Live deployed-URL probing from inside the tool — v2.2.x extension
Full Playwright trace ZIP parsing — v2.2.x

front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — documentation + structural-test + tool extension. The plugin's PRODUCT gains stronger verification-claim discipline; the plugin's OWN test surface is pytest stdlib-only.
